summary: Implemented a bounded headless Node runner and test coverage for accepted M5 slice world multi-year AI continuation. The runner keeps AI actions on the same GameCommand path as players, replays the accepted slice deterministically, runs a fixed-duration no-rescue continuation, and records summary evidence for no deadlock, zero invariant failures, bounded AI trace size, bounded rejection/error counts, and explainable no-action/wait/withdraw/target-change reasons. No telemetry, analytics, server, multiplayer, arbitrary-code AI scripting, personality simulation, or full diplomacy AI was added.

tests_run.result: Before the final state-file writes, the workspace showed modified apps/sim-runner/package.json and pnpm-lock.yaml plus untracked apps/sim-runner/src/run-m5-multiyear-ai-run.mjs, packages/sim-ai/, and tests/sim-ai-multiyear-ai-run.test.ts.
Determinism canary passed; accepted M5 slice replay and load/verify hashes matched.
Architecture boundary checks passed; root vitest passed with 35 files / 249 tests; web test passed with 1 file / 4 tests.

Final hash a83d87d8; schedule hash 1ddcf36b; trace hash 1811680d; no deadlock true; invariant failures 0; AI attempts 730; AI accepted commands 0; AI no-action decisions 730; probe reasons covered no-action m4.ai.no-action.no-visible-campaign, wait m4.ai.wait.supply-shortfall, withdraw m4.ai.withdraw.supply-collapse, and target-change m4.ai.objective-change.knowledge-target; slice replay rejected the duplicate postwar command as duplicate-obligation-settlement.
Validated after the REVIEW handoff and state updates.

decisions: Added a dedicated @monsoon/sim-ai workspace package to hold deterministic multi-year AI run helpers and evidence shaping.
Kept AI on the same GameCommand path as player actions and limited the continuation to deterministic scheduling plus slice replay, not a new authority path.
Generated reason evidence from deterministic probe fixtures rather than from arbitrary scripting or telemetry.

risks.risk: The live multi-year continuation still produces no accepted AI commands in the accepted slice world, so command-path evidence is mostly demonstrated through the deterministic probe fixtures.
Workspace package addition and pnpm-lock.yaml churn should be reviewed for unintended dependency drift, although no new production runtime category was introduced.
The scope intentionally excludes telemetry, analytics, server infrastructure, multiplayer, arbitrary-code AI scripting, personality simulation, and full diplomacy AI.

requested_action: Review the multi-year AI run implementation, deterministic evidence, and scope boundaries for acceptance.
